title: High blood sugar (hyperglycaemia) - NHS
text:
k or have stomach pain you're breathing more quickly than usual or your heart is beating faster than usual you feel drowsy or are struggling to stay awake your breath has a fruity smell (like pear drop sweets) you feel confused or have difficulty concentrating you have a high level of ketones in your blood or pee These could be signs you're becoming seriously unwell.
You can call 111 or get help from 111 online .
Page last reviewed: 26 May 2022
Next review due: 26 May 2025
